title: Super Mario Flash
description: Classic Mario platformer recreated in Flash. Run, jump, and stomp your way through 8 worlds of retro fun.
creator: Pouetpu

title: Happy Wars
description: Chaotic multiplayer action RPG with cartoon battles. Choose your class and fight for glory.
creator: Toylogic

title: The Impossible Quiz
description: Think you're smart? This quiz will prove you wrong. Hilariously tricky questions with absurd answers.
creator: Splapp-Me-Do

title: Run 2
description: Endless runner through a futuristic space station. Jump, flip, and slide to survive as long as possible.
creator: Player 01

title: Bloons Tower Defense
description: Pop waves of balloons by strategically placing towers. The original tower defense classic that spawned a franchise.
creator: Ninja Kiwi

title: Alien Hominid
description: Run-and-gun action as a little alien fighting off FBI agents. The flash game that became a console hit.
creator: Tom Fulp & Dan Paladin

title: Line Rider
description: Draw tracks and watch a little sledder ride them. Mesmerizing physics sandbox that became a viral sensation.
creator: Boštjan Čadež (fšk)

title: Dad 'n Me
description: Street-fighting action with a father-daughter combo. Kick and punch through waves of enemies in this Newgrounds classic.
creator: Tom Fulp & Dan Paladin

title: Portal: The Flash Version
description: A faithful recreation of Portal in Flash. Solve puzzles using the portal gun to teleport through walls.
creator: Daveey & Weasel

title: Age of War
description: Evolve through the ages from cavemen to mech warriors. Base-building strategy meets side-scrolling combat.
creator: Louissi

title: The Fancy Pants Adventure: World 1
description: Slick stick-figure platformer with stylish pants. Run, jump, and slide through hand-drawn levels in this Newgrounds classic.
creator: Brad Borne

title: The World's Hardest Game
description: Navigate a red square through obstacle-filled levels. Simple graphics, brutal difficulty — the name doesn't lie.
creator: Snubby Land

title: The World's Hardest Game 2
description: The sequel brings even more deviously designed levels. Same minimalist style, twice the frustration.
creator: Snubby Land

title: Happy Wheels
description: Ragdoll physics-based obstacle course game. Choose from various characters and try not to lose a limb.
creator: TotalJerkface

title: Achievement Unlocked
description: A meta-game about unlocking achievements. Explore a tiny world and discover absurd ways to earn every achievement.
creator: Jmtb02

title: Bloxorz
description: Roll a rectangular block through isometric mazes to drop it into a square hole. Deceptively simple, incredibly addictive.
creator: AddictingGames

title: N Game
description: A ninja platformer with pixel-perfect controls. Wall-jump and dash through 500 levels in this IGF audience award winner.
creator: Metanet Software

title: Raft Wars
description: Defend your treasure from raiders in this physics-based aiming game. Launch projectiles to knock enemies into the water.
creator: Miniclip

title: Stick RPG Complete
description: Live the life of a stick figure in a free-roaming RPG. Work, earn money, and explore a pixelated city.
creator: XGen Studios

title: Motherload
description: Dig deep underground mining gems and ores. Upgrade your drill and unearth treasures in this addictive digging game.
creator: XGen Studios
